caveat: Real BR-PT handwriting (BRESSAY, ICDAR 2024). Domain gap: student essays, not occurrence forms — directional; also measure on curated real sheets. Word-level images (not lines); only 42/199 test IDs matched the downloaded subset.

vlm.reason: Ollama not running at time of eval. Re-run: BRESSAY_DIR=datasets/bressay/bressay make eval-bressay N=20 with Ollama serving qwen2.5vl:3b.

notes: CER=1.0 for Tesseract on word-level handwritten images is expected: Tesseract is designed for page/line-level printed text, not isolated handwritten words. Confirms Tesseract cannot read real BR-PT handwriting. VLM column to be filled when Ollama is running.
